channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Marley magic: Pittsburg defeats San Ramon Valley in NCS Division I title game behind clutch play from quarterback Marley Alcantara
item.description: NCS Division I football championship: Pittsburg quarterback Marley Alcantara leads Pittsburg to fourth consecutive Division I title with 35-28 win over San Ramon Valley.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Colorado Buffaloes finishes season with a win over Oklahoma State 52-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado head coach Deion Sanders confidently told the media before the game that his team wasn’t just aiming to win but to dominate. Travis Hunter wasted no time backing up that claim.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Kansas City Chiefs have made a habit of winning games in the most improbable of ways. The way they beat the Raiders on Friday still had Patrick Mahomes and Co. shaking their heads in disbelief.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Tommy Edman agrees to $74 million, 5-year contract with Dodgers after helping win World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tommy Edman and the Los Angeles Dodgers agreed Friday to a $74 million, five-year contract. His new deal contains a team option for 2030 and includes $25 million deferred over 10 years. The agreement supersedes a $16.5 million, two-year contract he agreed to with St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears fire coach Matt Eberflus after skid marked by poor decisions late in games
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Matt Eberflus was fired by the Chicago Bears on Friday, one day after botching a timeout in a loss at Detroit. Offensive coordinator Thomas Brown will serve as interim coach, the Bears said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor rather than become the latest team to forfeit against San Jose State after the top-seeded Rams advanced to the Mountain West volleyball tournament final on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose State volleyball to face Colorado State in Mountain West title match
item.description: The Spartans had first-round bye, then advanced to the championship match when Boise State forfeited a semifinal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Nowels, The Mercury News

item.title: Bills quarterback Josh Allen engaged to Hailee Steinfeld
item.description: Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen and singer/actress Hailee Steinfeld announced on Friday that they are engaged to be married. They have dated since May 2023.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Colorado's Shedeur Sanders, Travis Hunter shine in likely final home game before going to NFL
item.description: Shedeur Sanders and Travis Hunter gave Colorado Buffaloes fans an awesome farewell, connecting for three touchdowns on Friday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago Bears fire head coach Matt Eberflus after disastrous Thanksgiving loss
item.description: The Chicago Bears have fired head coach Matt Eberflus following a six-game losing streak, with offensive coordinator Thomas Brown serving as interim coach.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Giants head coach Brian Daboll not worried about his job after his team was first eliminated from playoffs
item.description: Brian Daboll's New York Giants are 2-10 just two seasons after making the playoffs, but he is not worried about losing his job in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego State will play in volleyball tournament after SJSU trans athlete prompts Boise State to forfeit
item.description: San Diego State's women's volleyball team released a statement suggesting it would not forfeit a potential conference title game vs. San Jose State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Taylor Swift spends Black Friday amid sea of red as boyfriend Travis Kelce's Chiefs face the Raiders
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Pop superstar Taylor Swift was spending Black Friday amid a sea of red to watch her boyfriend, Travis Kelce, and the rest of the Kansas City Chiefs as they played the Las Vegas Raiders in a chilly matinee at Arrowhead Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: SJSU 'disappointed' in Boise State's decision to forfeit playoff game against trans player
item.description: San Jose State University's women's volleyball team is in the Mountain West final, but the school is "disappointed" in how they got there.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Packers take advantage of frigid home-field elements in win against Dolphins
item.description: The Green Bay Packers took advantage of the elements at Lambeau Field against the Miami Dolphins to finish off the Thanksgiving tripleheader.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago looks to break Boston's 6-game win streak
item.description: Boston Celtics (15-3, second in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (8-12, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Friday, 8 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chicago visits Minnesota after Hall's hat trick
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (8-12-2, in the Central Division) vs. Minnesota Wild (14-4-4, in the Central Division) Saint Paul, Minnesota; Friday, 2 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Jose State is disappointed Boise State forfeited but looks forward to volleyball final
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — San Jose State said Thursday it was disappointed Boise State forfeited its semifinal match in the Mountain West women's volleyball tournament but that the Spartans were focused on the future.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Caleb Williams still poised to break Bears QB records despite roller coaster rookie season
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown poise and promise as the Chicago Bears quarterback, despite the team's struggles, and is on track to break franchise records for passing yards and touchdowns.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Padres launch holiday ticket sale for 2025 season, but not for long
item.description: SAN DIEGO (FOX 5/KUSI) -- For a limited time only, San Diego Padres fans can score single-game tickets for the 2025 season. On Thursday, the team launched its holiday sale, which will last until midnight on Friday, Dec. 6.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Blake Snell agrees to 5-year deal with Dodgers: reports
item.description: (KRON) -- After one year with the San Francisco Giants, star pitcher Blake Snell left for their biggest rival. Snell agreed to a five-year deal with the Los Angeles Dodgers on Wednesday, according to reports from ESPN, MLB.com and others. Snell is a two-time Cy Young award winner.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Vucevic and White lead Bulls to 127-108 win over Wizards, losers of 12 straight
item.description: Nikola Vucevic scored 19 points and grabbed 12 rebounds as the Chicago Bulls eased to a 127-108 victory over the struggling Washington Wizards on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rays will play 19 of their first 22 games at home as MLB switches series to avoid summer rain
item.description: Major League Baseball switched a pair of series involving the Tampa Bay Rays to the first two months of the season in an attempt to avoid summer rain at open-air Steinbrenner Field, their temporary home following damage to Tropicana Field.
item.dc:creator: AP, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds ruling to allow SJSU women's volleyball team member to play
item.description: DENVER (AP) — A federal appeals court upheld a ruling Tuesday that allows a San Jose State women’s volleyball team member to play in this week’s Mountain West Conference tournament after a legal complaint said she should be ineligible on grounds that she is transgender. The 10th U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giants looked terrible after emotionally draining week
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Giants' performance yesterday was putrid. They got embarrassed by the Bucs 30-7. Tommy DeVito got mocked by Tampa quarterback Baker Mayfield. Boo's rained down at MetLife Stadium. Effort was not there.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Toronto holds off Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: TORONTO (AP) - Mitch Marner scored twice in a second-period surge as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 on Sunday night to extend their winning streak to four. The victory, in the lone NHL game on the schedule, came in the first meeting between Toronto and Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Montrose football dominates, off to State Final Four
item.description: The Montrose Red Hawks delivered a commanding performance in the third round of the Class 4A playoffs, defeating Mesa Ridge 53-21 on Friday night to secure their spot in the semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: BYU comeback falls short at ASU, 28-23
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU's offense took too late to get going, and the Cougars' chances at a Big 12 Championship took a serious hit with a 28-23 loss at Arizona State Saturday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU sweeps men's and women's cross-country national titles
item.description: WACO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - BYU became just the fifth school ever to win national titles in both men's and women's cross-country. The #1 ranked women's team won its sixth in program history, with a team score of 147 at the Zimmer Championship Course Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls host the Grizzlies in non-conference play
item.description: Memphis Grizzlies (9-7, ninth in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (7-10, seventh in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Grizzlies -5.5; over/under is 242.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Memphis Grizzlies visit the Chicago Bulls in a non-conference matchup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giannis gets triple-double as Bucks rout Pacers in NBA Cup
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, 11 assists, and 10 rebounds for his second triple-double in his last four games, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Indiana Pacers 129-117 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, NewsNation
